summary: Add UI-matching `remove-buffers`, narrow `trim-edges`, and unofficial-API `find-mistakes` commands and `clips edit-pass` flags. Fix the pre-existing silent no-op in `--trim-silences-gt` (extractSilenceRanges field-shape drift + cut-args shape).
reason: Tella's Cut panel exposes Remove buffers and Find mistakes that the published CLI didn't cover. Live smoke tests against api.tella.com on 2026-05-16 confirmed both POST shapes return 404 — the public OpenAPI has no equivalent. The web UI calls unofficial hosts: www.tella.tv (`/api/stories/{vid}/scenes/{cl}/silences?mode=...` + apply PATCH) for buffer trimming and prod-stream.tella.tv (`/ai-mistakes/analyze-scene` SSE) for mistake detection. Both unofficial hosts reject the public-API Bearer token with 401 `not_authenticated` and require a session cookie issued to a logged-in browser. This patch composes the documented public endpoints (GET /silences + POST /cut) for Remove buffers / Trim edges, and uses a mixed-auth path for Find mistakes (cookie-auth analyze + Bearer-auth public /cut apply) behind a hard `--unofficial` gate. Side-fix: extractSilenceRanges previously only handled `{start,end}`/`{startMs,endMs}` shapes, missing today's `{startTimeMs,durationMs}` response — that's why `--trim-silences-gt N` had been silently planning zero cuts on the live API. The parser now handles both shapes and the planned cut args now use the spec-correct `{fromMs,toMs}`.
validated_outcome: go build/vet/test all clean (24 unit tests across the cli package). Skill verifier: ✓ All checks passed. Live smoke against the test workspace: `videos clips remove-buffers <vid> <cl> --dry-run --min-ms 500` planned 42 cuts from 105 silences; `videos clips trim-edges <vid> <cl> --dry-run` planned head/tail correctly; `videos clips find-mistakes <vid> <cl> --unofficial --detect-only` confirms the unofficial AI service returns detected mistakes when a fresh session cookie is set. Reset via PATCH /clips/{clipId} {cuts:[]} after each mutating run.

deferred_to_upstream.feature: single-POST remove-buffers + find-mistakes endpoints on the public API
deferred_to_upstream.reason: If Tella publishes these on api.tella.com, the per-clip composition wrappers in this patch should be replaced by direct endpoint calls. Tracked at the upstream issue below.
TELLA_SESSION_COOKIE manual paste is brittle. A login flow or browser-extension capture would improve UX; out of scope for this patch.
